sp_instance.placeholder_template: {{options.advancedOptions.title}}
sp_instance.title: Popular Topics

sys_update_version.name: sp_instance_bdb1cdac9359c350945375dcebba10f2
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sp_instance"><sp_instance action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><active>true</active><advanced_placeholder_dimensions>true</advanced_placeholder_dimensions><async_load>true</async_load><async_load_device_type>desktop,mobile,tablet</async_load_device_type><async_load_trigger>viewport</async_load_trigger><class_name/><color>default</color><css/><glyph/><id/><order>1</order><placeholder_dimensions>{
  "mobile": {
    "height": "100%",
    "width": "100%"
  },
  "desktop": {
    "height": "100%",
    "width": "100%"
  },
  "tablet": {
    "height": "100%",
    "width": "100%"
  }
}</placeholder_dimensions><placeholder_dimensions_script><![CDATA[function evaluateConfig(options) {
    return {
        "mobile": {
            "height": "100%",
            "width": "100%"
        },
        "desktop": {
            "height": "100%",
            "width": "100%"
        },
        "tablet": {
            "height": "100%",
            "width": "100%"
        },
        title: gs.getMessage(options.widget_title)
    };
}]]></placeholder_dimensions_script><placeholder_template><div class="skeleton-loader-container popular-topics-skeleton panel panel-wrapper">
  <div class="panel-heading b-b">
    <h2 class="panel-title">
      {{options.advancedOptions.title}}
    </h2>
  </div>

  <div class="skeleton-loader-body"
       ng-if="options.display_size == 'Normal' || !options.display_size">
    <div class="normal-view" ng-class="{'fixed-view': options.topic_limit}">
      <div ng-repeat="x in ([].constructor(options.topic_limit*1) | limitTo:8) track by $index"
           class="skeleton-loading-card">
        <div class="skeleton-item"></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="skeleton-loader-body"
       ng-if="options.display_size == 'Small'">
    <div class="small-view">
      <div ng-repeat="x in ([].constructor(options.topic_limit*1) | limitTo:8) track by $index"
           class="skeleton-loading-card">
        <div class="skeleton-item"></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div></placeholder_template><preserve_placeholder_size>false</preserve_placeholder_size><roles/><short_description/><size>md</size><sp_column display_value="1">f1b1cdac9359c350945375dcebba10ea</sp_column><sp_widget display_value="Popular Topics">70a162c96be07410d70bc141ee44afba</sp_widget><sys_class_name>sp_instance</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-02 10:34:51</sys_created_on><sys_id>bdb1cdac9359c350945375dcebba10f2</sys_id><sys_mod_count>5</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Popular Topics</sys_name><sys_package display_value="msdportal" source="x_146833_msdportal">d5d7a83f93898b10945375dcebba1081</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="msdportal">d5d7a83f93898b10945375dcebba1081</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sp_instance_bdb1cdac9359c350945375dcebba10f2</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-02 10:42:01</sys_updated_on><title>Popular Topics</title><url/><widget_parameters><![CDATA[{
	"widget_title": {
		"value": "",
		"displayValue": ""
	},
	"topic_limit": {
		"value": "8",
		"displayValue": "8"
	},
	"display_size": {
		"value": "Normal",
		"displayValue": "Normal"
	},
	"border_color": {
		"value": "Border-tertiary",
		"displayValue": "Border-tertiary"
	},
	"hexcode": {
		"value": "",
		"displayValue": ""
	},
	"icon": {
		"value": "true",
		"displayValue": "true"
	},
	"load_config": {
		"value": "async",
		"displayValue": "Asynchronous"
	},
	"show_empty_state": {
		"value": "false",
		"displayValue": "false"
	}
}]]></widget_parameters></sp_instance><sys_translated_text action="delete_multiple" query="documentkey=bdb1cdac9359c350945375dcebba10f2"/></record_update>
